# xRegistry schema fixture

`xregistry-model-v1.0-rc2.schema.json` is an unmodified copy of the official
[xRegistry v1.0-rc2 model schema](https://github.com/xregistry/spec/blob/dbcbeac1dce9a0653ea39ea504f52edde2dc00a2/core/model.schema.json)
(tag `v1.0-rc2`, commit `dbcbeac1dce9a0653ea39ea504f52edde2dc00a2`).
Its SHA-256 is `6916828e0a68176c3f15e5ec4f5db6c6331d1b664397841408710be62e5e4c24`;
the contract test verifies this pin before validating service models. The source
repository is licensed under Apache-2.0.
